name: KBS Real Estate Investment Trust III, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview KBS Real Estate Investment Trust III, Inc. (the Company) is a Maryland corporation that has elected to be taxed as a real estate investment trust (REIT) and it intends to continue to operate in such a manner. As used herein, the terms we, our and us refer to the Company and as required by context, KBSLimited Partnership III, a Delaware limited partnership, which we refer to as our Operating Partnership, and to their subsidiaries.
